title: Drug Scheduling and Controlled Substances in the Caribbean
description: This course covers the differences in drug scheduling and controlled substance regulations across the major CARICOM islands, with a focus on the clinical role of pharmacy technicians in dispensing and record-keeping for these high-risk medications.
what_youll_learn: Identify the drug scheduling frameworks used in Jamaica, Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize
Explain the controlled substance prescribing and dispensing requirements for each island
Demonstrate proper record-keeping procedures for controlled medications
Recognize the unique clinical challenges in managing these drugs within the Caribbean healthcare context
Apply best practices to mitigate supply chain risks and medication errors
